# cirro_classification (Resource)

Manages a Cirro data governance classification. Classifications are applied to projects to enforce compliance requirements.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cirro_classification" "example" {
  name        = "PHI"
  description = "Protected Health Information — requires HIPAA controls."

  # Optionally link to governance requirements
  # requirement_ids = ["req-abc123"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description of what this classification means.
- `name` (String) Classification name (max 100 characters).

### Optional

- `requirement_ids` (List of String) IDs of governance requirements attached to this classification.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
